summary: Completed frontend testing of the advanced calculator on /calculator page. All features working correctly: asset selection, amount input/slider, validation, projections with detailed metrics (pool share %, net profit, IRR, cash flow breakdown, 3 scenarios), and CTA button. OLD basic calculator UI (term slider, preset chips) successfully removed.
passed_tests: Page loads correctly at /calculator with lazy loading (Suspense)
Asset selector [data-testid=calc-asset] opens popover and lists 3 open assets from API
Selecting different assets updates asset info panel (category, location, horizon, IRR, pool size, min ticket)
Contribution input [data-testid=calc-amount] updates projection panel with all metrics
Projection panel [data-testid=calc-projection] displays: pool share %, monthly rental cash flow, appreciation, gross profit, tax (19.5%), net profit, effective IRR, total at exit
Three scenario pills displayed: Conservative (IRR -20%), Base, Optimistic (IRR +15%)
Validation: entering amount below minimum ticket shows red error message 'Мінімальна частка цього активу — ...'
Validation: projection panel shows prompt 'Вкажіть коректну суму внеску, щоб побачити прогноз' instead of numbers when amount is invalid
CTA button [data-testid=calculator-cta] present, enabled, and navigates to /objects/{assetId}
OLD basic calculator UI (term slider '6 міс.'..'60 міс.' and preset chips 'Збалансований/Комерція/Зростання') NOT present on /calculator page
